headlines.description: RB Leipzig struck twice in the first half to edge past visitors Heidenheim 2-1 on Saturday and leapfrog Borussia Dortmund into fourth place in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wasteful Leipzig battle past Heidenheim to move into top four

video.headline: RB Leipzig vs. 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (RB Leipzig vs. 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 - Game Highlights) 2023/12/02 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart's Deniz Undav and Serhou Guirassy scored to give them a 2-0 home win over Werder Bremen on Saturday, their third league victory in a row that kept them third in the table with a four-point lead over fourth-placed RB Leipzig.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart ease past Werder for third win in a row

video.headline: Deniz Undav Goal 17' VfB Stuttgart - Werder Bremen
